name: Transport Cluster SME ICT Procurement Policy
description: Additional obligations for Transport cluster agencies procuring ICT from SME suppliers at medium value and above. Designed to support the cluster's SME engagement commitments and local industry participation goals.
source: Transport for NSW Procurement Policy — SME Participation Strategy 2024

pre_checks.title: Confirm SME eligibility
pre_checks.body: Before proceeding, confirm the intended supplier meets the NSW SME definition: fewer than 200 employees and not a subsidiary of a large enterprise. Request a self-declaration from the supplier.

pre_checks.title: Check Transport Digital Supplier Panel
pre_checks.body: The Transport cluster maintains a pre-qualified SME digital supplier panel. Check whether the requirement can be sourced from a panel member before approaching the open market.

obligations.title: SME participation plan required
obligations.body: Procurements with an SME supplier at medium value or above must include a documented SME participation plan, covering: how the supplier will be supported to meet contract requirements, payment terms (no more than 20 business days), and contact escalation arrangements.
obligations.policy: Transport for NSW Procurement Policy — SME Participation Strategy 2024, s4.1

obligations.title: Accelerated payment terms
obligations.body: Contracts with SME suppliers within the Transport cluster must include payment terms of no more than 20 business days from invoice receipt. Standard 30-day terms are not acceptable for SME ICT contracts.
obligations.policy: NSW Government SME and Regional Procurement Policy — Payment Terms

obligations.title: Notify Procurement team of SME ICT contracts
obligations.body: All ICT contracts with SME suppliers at or above $250,000 must be notified to the Transport Cluster Procurement team within 5 business days of execution. Use the cluster contract register.
obligations.policy: Transport for NSW Procurement Policy — Cluster Visibility s6.2

steps: Confirm supplier meets NSW SME definition (fewer than 200 employees)
Check Transport Digital Supplier Panel for pre-qualified SME providers
Document SME participation plan before contract execution

approval_additions.note: Must be notified of SME ICT contracts at or above $250,000 within 5 business days of execution
